The '''Tchotchee pistol''' was a variant of the [[Flare gun|flare pistol]] that was considered to be more "trendy and stylish". It was first used by [[Talus/Legends|Talusian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Joh'hanna Ghibbyyns]].

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
